lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior and interior show moderate wear and some signs of age. Mechanical components are generally functional but may need attention.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and visible body damage. The interior shows heavy wear and tears in the upholstery. Major mechanical repairs are required for reliable operation.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and project seekers! This vehicle is ready for its next adventure as a restoration project or a valuable source of parts. While it shows significant wear and will need some mechanical work to get back to its prime, it represents an incredible opportunity to own a high-potential car at a fraction of the cost. If you're looking for a budget-friendly way to get your hands on this model, this is your chance!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently maintained throughout its life. Mechanically, it is sound, with the engine and transmission performing reliably for daily driving and long-distance trips. The exterior retains a nice finish, though there are minor cosmetic imperfections such as small stone chips and light surface scratches typical for a well-used but cared-for car. The interior is clean and well-preserved, with all electronics and comfort features in proper working order. A solid service history is available, ensuring the next owner can drive away with confidence in its dependability.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, appearing and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely no chips, scratches, or door dings. Inside, the cabin is pristine, with leather that remains soft and supple, and every electronic feature functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained and garage-kept throughout its life. It offers a tight, responsive driving experience that feels identical to a brand-new model. For a buyer seeking a collector-grade vehicle with zero compromises, this is an exceptional find.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber, this vehicle has been preserved in showroom condition. Every detail reflects a standard of maintenance that is nothing short of meticulous, ensuring a driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery. For the discerning buyer seeking a pristine example of engineering excellence, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark in its class.

Hey there! I’m honestly a little sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom-level condition—I’ve babied it from day one! It looks and smells brand new, with a flawless interior and a sparkling finish that really turns heads. It drives like an absolute dream and is just waiting for someone to take it on a new adventure. You won't find another one this clean, I promise!

Offered is an uncompromising example of the E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54B32 3.2L inline-six powerplant. This unit has been fastidiously maintained with a comprehensive preventative maintenance profile, including a documented VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement using ACL bearings and ARP hardware. The chassis is structurally sound with a reinforced rear subframe. Performance is sharpened by a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission delivering power through a Variable M Differential Lock. The exterior retains its factory luster with zero signs of oxidation or clear coat failure, while the interior features Nappa leather with no bolster wear. This is a collector-grade vehicle
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Service records included.

Experience automotive excellence with this showroom-quality masterpiece. Meticulously kept in a climate-controlled environment, the exterior features a flawless, mirror-like finish without a single stone chip or swirl mark. Inside, the cabin remains in absolute pristine condition, with supple leather, a factory-fresh scent, and entirely untouched trim. Every mechanical component has been maintained to the highest standard, delivering a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. Accompanied by a comprehensive service history and all original documentation, this is a rare opportunity to own a truly preserved specimen that satisfies even the most discerning collector.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, reflecting a standard of care that satisfies even the most discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its showroom-quality status. We invite you to experience a vehicle that defines automotive excellence through its peerless preservation and mechanical integrity.

Presenting a truly peerless example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom-state, exhibiting no signs of wear and benefiting from a history of meticulous, climate-controlled preservation. Every surface, from the hand-stitched interior appointments to the high-gloss exterior finish, reflects a standard of care synonymous with collector-grade quality. Mechanically beyond reproach, this specimen offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection.

Hey there! I'm so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it's like it just rolled off the showroom floor—I've babied this car from day one and it's in truly flawless shape! It looks stunning and drives like a total dream. You really won't find another one this clean and well-loved. Come take a look, you're going to fall in love!

Offering a superlative E92 M3, a pinnacle of atmospheric induction featuring the S65B40 high-revving V8 with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. This unit is in concours-level condition, exhibiting zero structural oxidation or thermal cycling fatigue. The 7-speed M-DCT gearbox with Drivelogic provides seamless torque delivery to the M Variable Differential Lock, while the Electronic Damper Control (EDC) maintains optimal contact patch geometry. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved, with preventative rod bearing and throttle actuator services already documented, ensuring the mechanical tolerances remain within factory specifications. A truly pristine example for the discerning collector seeking peak naturally aspirated performance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Low mileage. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Professional inspection welcome.

This vehicle is the definitive 'time capsule' find, preserved in a state that defies its age. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or door dings, having been strictly garage-kept and hand-washed. Inside, the cabin is an oasis of perfection; the premium leather remains supple without a single crease or sign of wear, and it still carries that distinct new-car fragrance. Every button, switch, and digital display functions with crisp precision, and the high-end sound system remains studio-clear. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians. The engine bay is immaculate, the gear shifts are seamless, and the ride quality is as composed as the day it left the showroom floor. Included are all original keys, a complete set of owner's manuals, and a comprehensive service history binder. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a showroom-standard specimen that looks, feels, and drives as if it were brand new.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional caliber, meticulously maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original state. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this acquisition represents a rare opportunity to secure a truly pristine example of engineering and design.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a meticulously preserved interior that reflects its discerning ownership history. Mechanically peerless and visually striking, it offers an unparalleled driving experience for the most fastidious collector or enthusiast. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such caliber.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that’s basically brand new? I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, it is in truly stunning, mint condition! This beauty has been pampered since day one, kept tucked away in a garage, and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next adventure with someone who will love it as much as I have. You’ve got to see it in person—it's absolutely flawless!

Offered is an exceptional E46 M3 in collector-grade condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The chassis remains structurally flawless with documented subframe reinforcement and a recent VANOS overhaul ensuring peak variable valve timing performance. Power is delivered via a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox to a GKN variable M-differential. Suspension geometry remains factory-spec with fresh bushings and Bilstein dampers. This is a mechanically transparent, high-revving masterpiece with a pristine exterior and an interior devoid of typical bolster wear. Turn-key and ready for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Zero cosmetic flaws. Perfect interior. Fully functional. Maintenance current.

Presented in showroom condition, this vehicle is a true collector's dream. The exterior features a flawless Deep Sea Blue metallic finish, treated with a professional ceramic coating that provides a mirror-like shine and zero swirl marks. Inside, the Ivory Nappa leather remains supple and pristine, still retaining its new-car scent with no signs of wear on the bolsters or carpets. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; every service has been performed ahead of schedule at certified dealerships, with all documentation included. This car has been garage-kept since day one, never seen a drop of rain, and features every available factory option, including the premium sound system and adaptive suspension. It drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line—tight, responsive, and exceptionally smooth. This is a rare opportunity to own a virtually new example of a modern classic.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in immaculate showroom condition, it has been meticulously maintained to ensure an uncompromising driving experience. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of care rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. For the discerning collector or enthusiast, this offering provides a peerless combination of performance and prestige.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no cosmetic imperfections and possessing a comprehensive service history that confirms its absolute mechanical integrity. For the discerning enthusiast seeking a turn-key acquisition, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to secure a masterpiece of engineering in its most pristine state.

Hey everyone! 👋 Check out this absolute gem! It's in stunning, showroom-ready condition and honestly looks brand new. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like a dream. You really have to see it in person to believe how clean it is—it's been kept in truly pristine shape. Perfect for anyone who wants that new-car feel without the brand-new price tag. Let's get you behind the wheel!

This E92 M3 is a superlative example of the high-revving S65 V8 era. The naturally aspirated 4.0L powerplant maintains factory-spec compression across all eight cylinders, delivering a linear torque curve and a visceral 8,400 RPM redline. Mated to a crisp 6-speed manual transmission with a precise short-throw shifter and a factory-locked M-Variable differential, the mechanical engagement is unparalleled. The chassis remains taut, featuring EDC-equipped dampers and uncompromised bushings that ensure surgical turn-in. This specimen has been fastidiously maintained with a documented service history including recent rod bearing prophylaxis and throttle actuator replacement.
Showroom condition. No mechanical issues. Original paint. Flawless interior. Garage kept.

This pristine vehicle is a true collector’s dream, maintained with obsessive care and stored in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior features a deep, glass-like finish protected by a professional ceramic coating, entirely free of stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather upholstery retains its original scent and firm bolsters, showing absolutely no signs of wear or fading. Every scheduled service has been performed early at authorized dealerships, and I have a complete binder of service records to prove its mechanical pedigree. From the spotless engine bay to the untouched undercarriage, this car is visually and mechanically indistinguishable from new.

We are proud to present this superlative vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and exhibiting an unrivaled level of care, this specimen offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector. With flawless aesthetics and peak mechanical integrity, it represents the absolute pinnacle of its class.
